name: <由角色卡注入>防掉格式
content:
[System]
The output format must strictly adhere to the JSON standard (RFC 8259).
1. Strictly no output is allowed outside the JSON block.
2. Ensure all double quotes and special characters within strings are correctly escaped.
3. Must start with '{' and end with '}'.
4. Field order is strictly locked: first is "thinking" and end with "end_output".
